summary: The diff implements all four animation requirements from REQ-1 in the BankFinanceBanner component: scroll-triggered fade+slide-up entrance via IntersectionObserver, pulsing glow on the 90% stat, shimmer sweep on the banner background, and hover scale+glow on the WhatsApp CTA button. CSS keyframe animations are used (no external libraries). prefers-reduced-motion support is present via motion-reduce: Tailwind variants and CSS media queries. The WhatsApp URL is preserved as wa.me/917838867880.

hallucinated_features.description: A floating animation (animate-float) was added to the Landmark icon in the BankFinanceBanner component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not mention any floating animation on the icon; it only specified fade-in+slide-up, 90% glow pulse, shimmer sweep, and WhatsApp CTA hover scale+glow.

hallucinated_features.description: Staggered horizontal slide-in animations (translate-x) were added to the main content block and stats column as separate scroll-triggered transitions.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified a single fade-in + slide-up for the section entering the viewport, not staggered horizontal slide-ins on individual sub-elements.
